title: DCPS 20V Triage — Board draws 5V but fails to negotiate 20V PD
WARNING: A2338 is MBP 13" M1. USB-C only (no MagSafe). Charger is Suona B379 (63W).
description: Board shows initial 5V draw but never negotiates to 20V. SoC may not be completing hard start, or CD3217 PD negotiation is failing.

steps.name: Verify PPBUS_AON present
steps.action: Check if charger IC is producing PPBUS_AON from initial 5V.
steps.if_fail: Go to dcps_5v_triage — charger circuit not working at all.

steps.name: Verify PP3V8_AON
if_fail: Check P3V8AON_PWR_EN (delayed enable from U5340, page 23)
Check P3V8AON_FAULT_L — if LOW, U5700 is in fault state
Check for shorts on PP3V8_AON branches (VDDMAIN, WLBT, etc.)
Thermal image to find hot component on 3V8 rail

steps.name: Verify PMU outputs
steps.action: Check key PMU rails needed for SoC hard start.
steps.if_fail: Identify which PMU rail is missing/shorted. Check that specific buck/LDO source. Thermal image for shorts.

steps.name: Verify SoC AWAKE rails
steps.action: If S1/S2 rails are good, check if AWAKE domains come up.
steps.expected: All DVFS rails present (variable voltage). PMU_ACTIVE_READY asserted HIGH.
steps.if_fail: SoC not reaching hard start → potential SoC failure, or upstream S1/S2 rail still marginal.

steps.name: Check PP5V_S2 and PP3V3_S2
steps.action: These standalone bucks need to be running for CD3217 to function.
if_fail: PP5V_S2 missing: Check UC300 (LT8642S), P5VS2_PWR_EN, discharge circuit (QC420/RC423/RC422)
PP3V3_S2 missing: Check UC710 (SN621371), P3V3S2_PWR_EN, discharge circuit (QC410/RC413/RC412)

steps.name: Check CD3217 specifically
steps.action: If SoC has completed hard start (PMU_ACTIVE_READY = HIGH) but 20V negotiation fails.
test: Check UF400/UF500 power rails: PP3V3_S2_UPC, PP1V25_S2, PP1V8_S2
Check SPI ROM for firmware corruption
Check USBC0/1 CC1/CC2 lines for shorts
steps.expected: All CD3217 power rails present. CC lines communicating.
steps.if_fail: CD3217 replacement needed, or SPI ROM corrupted. Try other USB-C port first.

steps.name: Check SPI NOR (U1970)
steps.action: SoC reads firmware from SPI NOR to complete boot. If SPI NOR is dead, SoC may stall before commanding CD3217.
test: Check PP1V25_AWAKE_IO at level shifters U1974/U1983/U1992
steps.expected: 1.8V at U1970, 1.25V at level shifters, SPI activity on scope
steps.if_fail: U1970 dead or level shifter fault → replace SPI NOR. Board will need DFU restore.
